subcodes.title: Words to Charles and Mariam Haney spoken in Feb. 1909
subcodes.first_line: In Europe and America many colleges and universities were founded; many plays, as comedies, have been written for the purpose of improving morality
subcodes.subjects: @religion as basis of morality; of divine civilization, @spiritual foundations of true knowledge, @critique of Western values; culture, @materialism; material vs. spiritual civilization, @war and peace
